name: Peanut Butter Rocky Road
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chocolate chips, butterscotch chips, and peanut butter in a 2-quart bowl.
2. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) until softened, about 2 to 2 minutes.
3. Stir until melted and smooth.
4. Mix in the marshmallows and peanuts until evenly coated.
5. Spread the mixture into a buttered square baking pan that measures 8 x 8 x 2 inches.
6. Refrigerate until firm, at least 1 hour.
7. Cut into bars measuring 2 x 1 inch each.
Makes 32 bars.
